name: QMIS Finance Securities Corporation
summary: QMIS Finance Securities Corporation does not have significant operations. The company intends to merge with or acquire an operating business. Previously, it was involved in the design, development, marketing, and distribution of playing cards, toys, games, and other novelties to military exchanges. The company was formerly known as Lightman Grant, Inc. and changed its name to QMIS Finance Securities Corporation in March 2013. QMIS Finance Securities Corporation was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Flushing, New York.
